Voc√™ est√° usando ZSH puro (sem Oh My Zsh). Para adicionar syntax highlighting, instale o plugin **zsh-syntax-highlighting**:

## Instala√ß√£o via Homebrew (recomendado no macOS)

```bash
brew install zsh-syntax-highlighting
```

Depois, adicione ao final do seu `~/.zshrc`:

```bash
source $(brew --prefix)/share/zsh-syntax-highlighting/zsh-syntax-highlighting.zsh
```

## Ou instala√ß√£o manual

```bash
git clone https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-syntax-highlighting.git ~/.zsh/zsh-syntax-highlighting
```

E adicione ao `~/.zshrc`:

```bash
source ~/.zsh/zsh-syntax-highlighting/zsh-syntax-highlighting.zsh
```

---

## Plugin adicional √∫til: autosuggestions

Para sugest√µes autom√°ticas baseadas no hist√≥rico (em cinza):

```bash
brew install zsh-autosuggestions
```

E adicione ao `~/.zshrc`:

```bash

```

content.text:
Sim! O ZSH suporta isso. Voc√™ pode habilitar navega√ß√£o e sele√ß√£o estilo editor de texto.

Adicione isso ao seu `~/.zshrc`:

```bash
# Navega√ß√£o por palavras (Option/Alt + setas)
bindkey "^[[1;3C" forward-word      # Option + ‚Üí
bindkey "^[[1;3D" backward-word     # Option + ‚Üê

# Ir para in√≠cio/fim da linha (Cmd + setas)
bindkey "^[[1;9C" end-of-line       # Cmd + ‚Üí
bindkey "^[[1;9D" beginning-of-line # Cmd + ‚Üê

# Deletar palavra anterior (Option + Backspace)
bindkey "^[^?" backward-kill-word

# Sele√ß√£o de texto (Shift + setas)
bindkey "^[[1;2C" forward-char      # Shift + ‚Üí (seleciona)
bindkey "^[[1;2D" backward-char     # Shift + ‚Üê (seleciona)
bindkey "^[[1;2A" up-line-or-history
bindkey "^[[1;2B" down-line-or-history
```

**Importante:** Para Cmd+setas funcionar no macOS Terminal/iTerm2, voc√™ precisa configurar o emulador de terminal:

### No iTerm2:

   - `‚å•‚Üê` ‚Üí Send Escape Sequence: `[1;3D`

### No Terminal.app:

content.text:
# Habilitando suporte a mouse no Zsh

## Para o Terminal.app (nativo do Mac)

O Terminal.app tem suporte limitado a mouse. Voc√™ pode habilitar algumas funcionalidades:

### 1. Habilitar modo de mouse no Zsh

Adicione ao seu `~/.zshrc`:

```bash
# Habilita suporte a mouse
set -o emacs  # ou set -o vi se preferir modo vi

# Para readline/zle com mouse (limitado no Terminal.app)
zle_highlight=('paste:none')
```

---

## Para o iTerm2 (recomendado)

O iTerm2 tem suporte muito melhor a mouse. Siga estes passos:

### 1. Configura√ß√µes do iTerm2

1. Abra **iTerm2 ‚Üí Settings** (ou `Cmd + ,`)
2. V√° em **Profiles ‚Üí Terminal**
3. Marque: **"Enable mouse reporting"**
4. V√° em **Profiles ‚Üí General**
5. Marque: **"Click to position cursor in shell"** (se dispon√≠vel)

### 2. Adicione ao `~/.zshrc`

```bash
# Habilita suporte a mouse no zsh
if [[ "$TERM_PROGRAM" == "iTerm.app" ]]; then
    # Ativa mouse reporting
    zle -N mouse-select
    bindkey -M emacs '\e[M' mouse-select
fi
```

### 3. Alternativa mais completa com zsh-autosuggestions

Para melhor experi√™ncia, muitos usam plugins como **zsh-syntax-highlighting** e **zsh-autosuggestions** com Oh My Zsh.

---

## Solu√ß√£o mais simples: usar a tecla Option

Uma abordagem pr√°tica que funciona em ambos os terminais:

1. **Option + Click** no iTerm2 posiciona o cursor na linha de comando
2. No **Terminal.app**: v√° em **Settings ‚Üí Profiles ‚Üí Keyboard** e marque **"Use Option as Meta key"**

---

## Recarregar configura√ß√µes

Ap√≥s editar o `~/.zshrc`:

```bash
source ~/.zshrc
```

# Hist√≥rico
HISTFILE="$HOME/.zsh_history"
HISTSIZE=50000
SAVEHIST=50000
setopt EXTENDED_HISTORY INC_APPEND_HISTORY_TIME SHARE_HISTORY
setopt HIST_EXPIRE_DUPS_FIRST HIST_IGNORE_DUPS HIST_IGNORE_ALL_DUPS
setopt HIST_IGNORE_SPACE HIST_VERIFY HIST_REDUCE_BLANKS

# Setas filtram hist√≥rico (digita texto + seta = filtra hist√≥rico)
autoload -U up-line-or-beginning-search down-line-or-beginning-search
zle -N up-line-or-beginning-search
zle -N down-line-or-beginning-search
bindkey "^[[A" up-line-or-beginning-search   # Seta cima
bindkey "^[[B" down-line-or-beginning-search # Seta baixo
bindkey "^[OA" up-line-or-beginning-search   # Seta cima (modo alternativo)
bindkey "^[OB" down-line-or-beginning-search # Seta baixo (modo alternativo)

export PATH=~/bin:$PATH
export PATH=/usr/local/bin:$PATH
export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH

# Docker
export PATH=$HOME/.docker/bin:$PATH

# Java
export JAVA_HOME=/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/zulu-17.jdk/Contents/Home

# Go
export GOPATH=~/go

# Android
export ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/emulator
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/tools
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/tools/bin
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools

# Python
export PATH="/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.13/bin:$PATH"
alias python="python3"
alias pip="pip3"

# ANTLR
export CLASSPATH=".:/usr/local/lib/antlr-4.13.2-complete.jar:$CLASSPATH"
alias grun='java org.antlr.v4.gui.TestRig'

# NVM
export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/bash_completion" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/bash_completion"

# PNPM
export PNPM_HOME="/Users/anotonio.silva/Library/pnpm"
case ":$PATH:" in
  *":$PNPM_HOME:"*) ;;
  *) export PATH="$PNPM_HOME:$PATH" ;;
esac

# Bun
export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"
export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"
[ -s "$HOME/.bun/_bun" ] && source "$HOME/.bun/_bun"

# Deno
. "$HOME/.deno/env"

# Cargo/Rust
. "$HOME/.cargo/env"

# rbenv (skip in IDE environment reader)
if [[ -z "$INTELLIJ_ENVIRONMENT_READER" ]]; then
  eval "$(rbenv init - --no-rehash zsh)"
fi

# Aliases
alias reload="source ~/.zshrc"
alias zshrc="idea ~/.zshrc"
alias w="webstorm"
alias t="idea /tmp/tmp.txt"
alias e="idea"
alias i="pm install"
alias z="cd ~/dev/zazcart && idea . && pnpm run dev"
alias zazcart="cd ~/dev/zazcart"
alias sshk0="ssh-add -D && ssh-add ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 && git config --global user.name 'antoniopresto' && git config --global user.email antoniopresto@gmail.com"
alias sshk1="ssh-add -D && ssh-add ~/.ssh/key1_rsa && git config --global user.name 'Merisio' && git config --global user.email 'contatomerisio2@gmail.com'"
alias tbl="cd ~/dev/tblv3-api && idea . && DEBUG_POSTHOG=1 NO_MONGO_LOG=1 yarn dev"
alias tblf="cd ~/dev/front-tblv3 && idea . && yarn dev-https"
alias intellicache="open ~/Library/Application\ Support/JetBrains/"
alias g="gemini --model gemini-3-pro-preview"
alias c="claude --debug --verbose"
alias ci="claude --debug --verbose --dangerously-skip-permissions --chrome"

# ls aliases
alias ll='ls -lh'
alias la='ls -lha'
alias l='ls -1A'

# functions
echopm(){
    local dir=${1:-$(pwd)}
    if [[ -f "$dir/package-lock.json" ]]; then
       echo "npm"
    elif [[ -f "$dir/bun.lockb" ]]; then
       echo "bun"
    elif [[ -f "$dir/yarn.lock" ]]; then
       echo "yarn"
    elif [[ -f "$dir/pnpm-lock.yaml" ]]; then
       echo "pnpm"
    fi
}

pm() {
  local pmResult=""
  local pmPath=$(pwd)
  local pmNextPath=$pmPath

  for i in {0..2}; do
    pmResult=$(echopm "$pmNextPath")
    if [[ $pmResult != "" ]]; then
        command $pmResult "$@"
        return 0;
    fi
    pmNextPath=$(dirname "$pmNextPath")
  done
  return 1
}

gitreset() {
  git add .
  COMMIT_SUCCESS=false
  if git commit -m 'temp' --no-verify; then
    COMMIT_SUCCESS=true
  fi
  git clean -fdx -e .idea
  if [ "$COMMIT_SUCCESS" = true ]; then
    git reset --soft HEAD~1
  fi
  rm -rf pnpm-lock.yaml
  rm -rf bun.lockb
  rm -rf yarn.lock
}

root() {
  local pmResult=""
  local pmPath=$(pwd)
  local pmNextPath=$pmPath

  for i in {0..7}; do
    pmResult=$(echopm "$pmNextPath")
    if [[ $pmResult != "" ]]; then
        cd $pmNextPath
        return 0
    fi
    pmNextPath=$(dirname "$pmNextPath")
  done
  return 1
}

# overload git command
git () {
    if [[ $1 == "backup" ]]; then
        shift

        # Skip interactive prompts in IDE environment reader
        if [[ -n "$INTELLIJ_ENVIRONMENT_READER" ]]; then
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null "$@"
            return
        fi

        echo -n "Descri√ß√£o do backup: "
        read description

        if [[ -z "$description" ]]; then
            echo "Erro: descri√ß√£o √© obrigat√≥ria."
            return 1
        fi

        local sanitized_description
        sanitized_description=$(echo "$description" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//' | sed 's/-$//')

        local original_branch
        original_branch=$(command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null branch --show-current)

        local timestamp
        timestamp=$(date +'%Y-%m-%d-%H-%M-%S')

        local backup_branch="${original_branch}-backup-${sanitized_description}-${timestamp}"

        if [[ -z $(command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null status --porcelain) ]]; then
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null branch "${backup_branch}"
            echo "Restore point created on clean branch: ${backup_branch}"
        else
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null add .
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null commit -m "backup: ${description}"
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null branch "${backup_branch}"
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null reset --soft HEAD~1
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null reset HEAD .
            echo "\nBackup created at: ${backup_branch}"
        fi
    else
        command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null "$@"
    fi
}

# Completions - fpath ANTES do compinit
fpath=($HOME/.docker/completions $fpath)
fpath=($HOME/.zsh/completions $fpath)

# Inicializa completion system
autoload -Uz compinit && compinit

# Completion settings
setopt MENU_COMPLETE                                  # Tab cicla inline pelas op√ß√µes
zstyle ':completion:*' matcher-list 'm:{a-z}={A-Z}'   # Case-insensitive
zstyle ':completion:*' list-colors 'di=34:ln=35:so=32:pi=33:ex=31:bd=34;46:cd=34;43:su=30;41:sg=30;46:tw=30;42:ow=30;43'
zstyle ':completion:*' special-dirs true              # Completa . e ..
zstyle ':completion:*:descriptions' format '%F{green}-- %d --%f'
zstyle ':completion:*:warnings' format '%F{red}-- sem matches --%f'

# Fish-style path abbreviation
_fish_path() {
  local p=${PWD/#$HOME/\~}
  local parts=(${(s:/:)p})
  local len=${#parts[@]}
  if (( len <= 1 )); then echo "$p"; return; fi
  local result=""
  for (( i=1; i<len; i++ )); do
    local part=${parts[i]}
    if [[ $part == .* ]]; then
      result+="${part:0:2}/"
    else
      result+="${part:0:1}/"
    fi
  done
  echo "${result}${parts[-1]}"
}

# Prompt: nome curto (verde) : path abreviado (azul) $
setopt PROMPT_SUBST
PROMPT='%F{green}$%f:%F{blue}$(_fish_path)%f $ '

# Plugins (syntax-highlighting deve ser o √∫ltimo)
#source ~/.zsh/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions/zsh-autosuggestions.zsh
source ~/.zsh/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlighting/zsh-syntax-highlighting.zsh

# Mouse support para iTerm2 - clique posiciona cursor
if [[ "$TERM_PROGRAM" == "iTerm.app" ]]; then
  zle-line-init() {
    # Ativa mouse tracking (SGR mode para suporte a coordenadas maiores)
    printf '\e[?1000h\e[?1002h\e[?1006h'
  }
  zle-line-finish() {
    # Desativa mouse tracking ao finalizar
    printf '\e[?1000l\e[?1002l\e[?1006l'
  }
  zle -N zle-line-init
  zle -N zle-line-finish

  # Fun√ß√£o que processa clique do mouse e posiciona cursor
  zle-mouse-handler() {
    emulate -L zsh
    local bt mx my
    # Parse SGR mouse event: \e[<button;x;y[Mm]
    if [[ $KEYS =~ '\[<([0-9]+);([0-9]+);([0-9]+)' ]]; then
      bt=${match[1]}
      mx=${match[2]}
      my=${match[3]}
      # Bot√£o 0 = clique esquerdo
      if (( bt == 0 )); then
        # Calcula posi√ß√£o no buffer considerando o prompt
        local prompt_len=${#${(%%)PROMPT}}
        local new_pos=$((mx - prompt_len - 1))
        # Limita ao tamanho do buffer
        (( new_pos < 0 )) && new_pos=0
        (( new_pos > $#BUFFER )) && new_pos=$#BUFFER
        CURSOR=$new_pos
      fi
    fi
  }
  zle -N zle-mouse-handler

  # Bind para eventos de mouse SGR
  bindkey '\e[<' zle-mouse-handler
fi

# Plugins (syntax-highlighting deve ser o √∫ltimo)
#source ~/.zsh/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions/zsh-autosuggestions.zsh
source ~/.zsh/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlighting/zsh-syntax-highlighting.zsh

# Mouse support para iTerm2 - clique posiciona cursor
if [[ "$TERM_PROGRAM" == "iTerm.app" ]]; then
  zle-line-init() {
    # Ativa mouse tracking (SGR mode para suporte a coordenadas maiores)
    printf '\e[?1000h\e[?1002h\e[?1006h'
  }
  zle-line-finish() {
    # Desativa mouse tracking ao finalizar
    printf '\e[?1000l\e[?1002l\e[?1006l'
  }
  zle -N zle-line-init
  zle -N zle-line-finish

  # Fun√ß√£o que processa clique do mouse e posiciona cursor
  zle-mouse-handler() {
    emulate -L zsh
    local bt mx my
    # Parse SGR mouse event: \e[<button;x;y[Mm]
    if [[ $KEYS =~ '\[<([0-9]+);([0-9]+);([0-9]+)' ]]; then
      bt=${match[1]}
      mx=${match[2]}
      my=${match[3]}
      # Bot√£o 0 = clique esquerdo
      if (( bt == 0 )); then
        # Calcula posi√ß√£o no buffer considerando o prompt
        local prompt_len=${#${(%%)PROMPT}}
        local new_pos=$((mx - prompt_len - 1))
        # Limita ao tamanho do buffer
        (( new_pos < 0 )) && new_pos=0
        (( new_pos > $#BUFFER )) && new_pos=$#BUFFER
        CURSOR=$new_pos
      fi
    fi
  }
  zle -N zle-mouse-handler

  # Bind para eventos de mouse SGR
  bindkey '\e[<' zle-mouse-handler
fi
